common.tagline: Form your Florida business in minutes.

footer.tagline: The transparent, modern way to form a Florida business. Free Year-1 Registered Agent included.
footer.copyright: © {year} Sunbiz Express, Inc. · Sunbiz Express is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.

hero.subhead: File your LLC or Corporation with the State of Florida — without the LegalZoom upsells, hidden fees, or 45-minute forms. We include a year of registered agent service, free.
hero.previewQuestion: What's the name of your business?
hero.previewSubtitle: We'll check availability against the Florida Sunbiz database in real time.
hero.previewSuccess: Great choice. No conflicts on the Florida Department of State record.
hero.previewNoSubscription: No subscription. No surprise charges. Cancel any add-on before payment.

features.subhead: Everything you need to form, fund, and run a Florida business — without the legal-tech overwhelm.
features.filed1DayBody: We submit to the Florida Department of State the same day you complete checkout, not 7–10 days later.
features.liveCheckBody: Real-time check against the Sunbiz database. We tell you if it's distinguishable on the record before you commit.
features.freeRABody: We maintain a Florida physical address for service of process — keeping your home address private.
features.documentsBody: Articles of Organization, Operating Agreement, EIN letter — formatted for banks, lenders, and the IRS.
features.complianceBody: Annual report reminders before the May 1 deadline. Optional managed filing means you'll never pay the $400 late fee.
features.transparentBody: State fees shown separately. No hidden subscriptions. No upsell carousel. The price you see is the price you pay.

howItWorks.step1Body: Choose LLC or Corporation, enter your name, and we check Sunbiz availability live.
howItWorks.step2Body: Starter (free), Pro ($99), or Concierge ($299). Add EIN, Operating Agreement, or domain.
howItWorks.step3Body: Type-to-sign your filing. Pay state fees + service fee in one transparent transaction.
howItWorks.step4Body: Submitted same business day. Documents are emailed and stored in your dashboard.

pricing.headline: Pick a plan. Pay once. Done.
pricing.subhead: No subscriptions. No hidden fees. The state filing fee is shown separately so you always know what you're paying.
pricing.footnote: Florida state filing fee: $125 for LLC · $70 for Corporation. Paid directly to the State of Florida.
pricing.tier_BASIC_desc: Just the essentials — file your business with the state.
pricing.tier_STANDARD_desc: Everything most owners need — including bank-account essentials.
pricing.tier_PREMIUM_desc: White-glove formation with year-round compliance + branding.
pricing.feat_sameDay: State filing submitted same business day

comparison.subhead: We did the homework so you don't have to. Pricing reflects standard formation tiers as of 2026.

testimonials.subhead: From solopreneurs to real-estate syndicators — over 2,400 Floridians filed with us this year.

faq.headline: Questions, answered.
faq.respondWithin: and we'll get back to you within one business day.

ctaBanner.subhead: Most owners finish in 15 minutes. We submit to the state the same business day.
ctaBanner.footnote: No credit card required to start · Cancel any time

auth.passwordHint: At least 8 chars, one capital, one number
auth.termsAgreement: I agree that Sunbiz Express is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice. I'm authorized to provide the information for forming a business.
auth.termsFooter: By creating an account, you agree to our
auth.sidePanelHeadline: Your Florida business, formed in fifteen minutes.
auth.sidePanelBody: Filing should feel as breezy as a Florida summer. We've reduced the typical 45-minute process to a clean 12-step flow — with transparent pricing.
auth.sidePanelSocial: Joined by 2,400+ Florida entrepreneurs this year.
auth.errorAccountExists: An account with that email already exists. Try signing in instead.

dashboard.title: Your business hub
dashboard.emptyBody: Form your first Florida business in under 15 minutes — we'll guide you through every step.
dashboard.documentsSubtitle: Download Articles, Operating Agreements, receipts, and other filings.
dashboard.documentsEmpty: Documents appear here once a filing is paid and submitted.
dashboard.complianceSubtitle: Florida requires annual reports between January 1 and May 1 each year. Miss the deadline and the state charges a non-waivable $400 late fee.
dashboard.complianceEmpty: Compliance deadlines appear here once you have an approved filing.
dashboard.complianceTip1: Annual reports due between January 1 and May 1 each year (11:59 PM ET)
dashboard.complianceTip3: $400 late fee is non-waivable — there is no hardship exception
dashboard.complianceTip4: Failure to file by the third Friday in September results in administrative dissolution
dashboard.complianceTip5: Reinstatement costs $100 (LLC) or $600 (Corp) plus all back fees

filingDetail.submittedToState: Filing submitted to Florida Department of State
filingDetail.annualReportEstimate: Once approved, due Jan 1 – May 1 next year

wizard.step1Subtitle: We'll handle the paperwork — you choose the structure.
wizard.step2Subtitle: We'll check the Florida Sunbiz database in real time.
wizard.step3Title: How much do you want us to do?
wizard.step3Subtitle: Pick the tier that matches your stage.
wizard.step4Subtitle: The physical or mailing location of your business operations.
wizard.step5Subtitle: Where you want official mail sent — can be the same as principal.
wizard.step6Subtitle: Required by Florida law. We can be yours, free for a year.
wizard.step7Subtitle: Who's authorized to act on behalf of the company?
wizard.step8Subtitle: For state notices, document delivery, and account updates.
wizard.step9Subtitle: Effective date, share count (Corp), professional purpose if applicable.
wizard.step10Subtitle: Confirm everything looks right and sign electronically.
wizard.step11Subtitle: Compliance, banking, branding — included or à la carte.
wizard.freeRABanner: Year-1 Registered Agent is included free.
wizard.entityHint: 💡 Not sure which to choose? Most small business owners start with an LLC. You can elect S-Corp tax treatment later for tax savings as your business grows.
wizard.suffixWarnLLC: Florida LLC names must end with LLC, L.L.C., or Limited Liability Company.
wizard.suffixWarnCorp: Florida corporation names must end with Corp, Corporation, Inc, Incorporated, Co, or Company.
wizard.nameTipsTitle: Quick tips for a strong name
wizard.nameTip1: Make it distinctive on the Florida record (not just punctuation differences)
wizard.nameTip2: Keep it under 70 characters for easier marketing
wizard.nameTip3: Check the matching .com domain availability — you can buy one in the next steps
wizard.nameTip4: Avoid restricted words (Bank, Trust, Insurance) without regulatory approval
wizard.principalTipBody: This is the address where you primarily conduct business. It can be a Florida address or out-of-state — Florida only requires the registered agent's address to be in Florida.
wizard.sameAsPrincipal: Use the same address as my principal office
wizard.mailingAddressNote: Mailing addresses can be a P.O. Box. Government correspondence will be sent here.
wizard.useOurAgentP4: Keeps your home address off the public record
wizard.useOwnAgentP1: Must have a Florida physical address (no P.O. Box)
wizard.useOwnAgentP2: Must consent to acting as agent
wizard.useOwnAgentP4: You'll need to update Florida if they change
wizard.poBoxRejection: P.O. Boxes are not allowed for registered agents — Florida law requires a physical street address.
wizard.raSignatureNote: By typing the agent's name below, you confirm they accept the appointment as Registered Agent and agree to act in this capacity. This is a legally binding electronic signature.
wizard.raSignatureLabel: Type the agent's name to sign
wizard.title: Title
wizard.ownershipWarn: ⚠ Ownership percentages add up to {total}%. Make sure they total 100% for clean tax filing.
wizard.correspondenceEmailHint: The Florida Department of State will send notices, annual report reminders, and confirmation emails to this address.
wizard.phoneHint: Useful for urgent compliance alerts. We never share your phone with third parties.
wizard.effectiveDateHint: Florida lets you backdate up to 5 days or schedule up to 90 days in the future. Leave blank to use today's date.
wizard.effectiveDateTip: 💡 Tip: If forming Oct 1 – Dec 31, set the effective date to January 1 of next year — you'll skip a full year of annual reports.
wizard.authorizedSharesHint: The number of shares your corporation is authorized to issue. Most early-stage companies start with 1,000–10,000,000.
wizard.businessPurposeHint: A brief description of what your business will do. Most LLCs leave this blank or write "any lawful business activity."
wizard.finalReviewBody: Once submitted, the Florida Department of State cannot easily amend your filing — you'd need to file a separate amendment. Take a moment to verify everything below.
wizard.signNote: Type your full name as the authorized representative. By doing so, you affirm the information is true and accurate, and your typed name has the same legal effect as a handwritten signature.
wizard.confirmAccurate: I confirm that the information above is true, complete, and accurate to the best of my knowledge. I understand Sunbiz Express is not a law firm and provides this service as a self-help tool.
wizard.errorCardDeclined: Your card was declined. Try a different card.
wizard.errorMembersRequired: Please add at least one member or officer with a name.
wizard.confirmNotAvailable: This name may not be distinguishable on the Florida record. Continuing means the state may reject your filing. Use the suggested alternatives?

checkoutSuccess.headline1: Your filing is on its way to
checkoutSuccess.subhead: We've submitted {name} to the Florida Department of State. You'll receive an email confirmation in moments.
checkoutSuccess.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation receipt and a copy of your Articles to {email}.
checkoutSuccess.stateProcessesBody: The Florida Department of State will review and approve your formation. We'll email you the moment your business is officially formed.
checkoutSuccess.documentsReadyBody: You can find your Articles, Operating Agreement, and Filing Receipt in your dashboard right now.
checkoutSuccess.openBankBody: Most banks accept your Articles + EIN + Operating Agreement to open an account. We've prepared all three for you.
checkoutSuccess.annualRemindersBody: We'll email you 60, 30, and 3 days before next year's deadline (Jan 1 – May 1) so you never pay the $400 late fee.

admin.filingsCount: {count} total · use the advance button to simulate state processing.
admin.outboxSubtitle: Mock email log — every email "sent" by the system is recorded here for inspection.
admin.selectEmail: Select an email to preview its contents.
